_meta.labeling: human (Jamal), reviewed from Claude-proposed first pass
_meta.spread: non-degenerate; all four brand×grounded quadrants represented (on/yes 7, on/no 3, off/yes 3, off/no 3)
_meta.note: Synthetic outputs spanning the quality range plus the two slice-3 adversarial cases shown both directions (injection followed/resisted, no-answer fabricated/abstained). Grounding context for the groundedness judge is the seeded coffee-roaster corpus; brand standards for the brand judge are the BrandPlaybook docs.
